---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# Markdown conventions

- Write functional, precise, clear prose. Focus on content, not decoration.
- No emoji, no flamboyant phrasing, no filler. Say what matters and stop.
- Prefer plain punctuation (commas, colons, parentheses, separate sentences)
  over em dashes.
- Keep technical terms in English when they match the code (class, metric,
  feature); don't translate them in non-English docs.
- Use headings and lists to structure content; keep lines readable.
- Document the why, not the what. Don't restate what the code already shows.
